title: ACT MIME `profile` parameter — closed enum
description: Per PRD-101-R7. The MIME `profile` parameter (per RFC 6906) carried on `application/act-manifest+json` and on the HTTP Link header advertising the manifest. The enum is CLOSED: adding a value is a MAJOR change per PRD-108-R5(4). PRD-101 owns this enum; PRD-803 owns the MIME type registration that the parameter is attached to.
